death.attack.magnum_opus.item: %1$s finished their magnum opus whilst fighting %2$s wielding %3$s
death.attack.magnum_opus.player: %1$s finished their magnum opus whilst fighting %2$s
enchantment.attuned.octave.desc: Swaps the boost from blocking to a long-range dash in any direction.
enchantment.attuned.shrill.desc: Allows the user to release a large shockwave upon blocking a hit, deafening nearby enemies.
enchantment.attuned.symphony.desc: If the user dies while blocking, they will be kept alive for ten extra seconds. Upon running out of time, they will instantly die.
